report_name: Fortinet Report: AI-Enabled Attacks Fuel 389% Surge in Ransomware Victims

threat_actors.name: AI-Enabled Cybercriminals
threat_actors.description: A class of threat actors leveraging generative AI tools like WormGPT and FraudGPT to automate and scale attacks, including phishing and ransomware, as described in the Fortinet 2026 Global Threat Landscape Report.

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: Used in a 389% year-over-year increase in confirmed ransomware incidents in 2025, targeting sectors like healthcare and retail.

attack_patterns.name: Phishing
attack_patterns.description: AI-powered tools like WormGPT and FraudGPT are used to create highly convincing phishing content at scale, bypassing traditional filters.

attack_patterns.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
attack_patterns.description: The average time-to-exploit for critical vulnerabilities has shrunk to 24-48 hours, indicating rapid exploitation of public-facing applications by attackers.

attack_patterns.name: Active Scanning
attack_patterns.description: AI tools are used to scan the internet for vulnerable systems and identify high-value targets based on industry, revenue, and technology stack.

attack_patterns.name: Spearphishing via Social Engineering LLM
attack_patterns.description: AI-powered tools like WormGPT and FraudGPT help criminals craft sophisticated phishing emails and social media lures at scale.

malware.name: WormGPT
malware.description: An AI-powered tool used by criminals as part of a crime-as-a-service offering to craft sophisticated phishing emails and other malicious content at scale.

malware.name: FraudGPT
malware.description: An AI-powered tool, similar to WormGPT, used to enhance the sophistication and scale of cybercrime, including generating phishing content.

identities.name: Hospitals/Physician Clinics
identities.description: A top targeted sector for ransomware attacks in 2025, according to the Fortinet report.

identities.name: Retail Sector
identities.description: A top targeted sector for ransomware attacks in 2025, according to the Fortinet report.
